function.rulebook_notes: Entity facts must come from canonical files in 10_entities/cast, and missing fields are unknown rather than guessed.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/petra.md includes Petra’s own birthday but no mother identity or mother birthday. The only other cast file mentioning Petra (10_entities/cast/hanna.md) identifies Hanna as bureau_lead, not mother. Therefore Petra’s mom birth date is missing from authoritative records.
